{"body":"# Chore: Change login heading text

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Chore |
| **Scope** | Full-stack |
| **Priority** | 🟡 P2 — Medium |

## Summary
Change the login page heading from "Ready to Succeed?" to "Ready to Success?" in the English i18n file.

## What Needs to Change
In `src/i18n/en.json`, find the key `auth.login.headingRest` and change its value from `"Ready to Succeed?"` to `"Ready to Success?"`.

## Affected Area
src/i18n/en.json

## Additional Context
Research notes:
- Searched code for "Ready to Succeed?" → found at `src/i18n/en.json` under `auth.login.headingRest`.
- This is the login page hero heading text displayed to users.
- Trivial change — single string replacement, no other code affected.

","title":"Change login heading text"}
